nodes.context: Lebanese Shia Islamist political party and militant group, designated as a terrorist organization by many countries. Engages in various criminal activities to fund its operations.
Colombian drug cartel that allied with Hezbollah-linked smugglers to traffic cocaine and launder money.
Colombian leftist guerrilla group involved in drug trafficking and alliance with Hezbollah-linked cells.
Irish organized crime group involved in drug trafficking, coordinated with Hezbollah in a cocaine shipment from Venezuela.
State sponsor of Hezbollah, providing financial, military, and training support.
State accused of funneling weapons to Hezbollah from its border with Lebanon.
Charity used to collect money for Hezbollah in Nigeria, pretending to help the Lebanese community.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money.

edges.context: Hezbollah received 12% of revenues from a cocaine smuggling and money laundering ring involving the North Valley Cartel.
Hezbollah was part of a cell formed from an alliance among the North Valley Cartel, FARC, and Lebanese smugglers.
Hezbollah organized a cocaine shipment from Venezuela in coordination with the Kinahan cartel, seized in Ireland in 2023.
Iran provides financial, military, and training support to Hezbollah.
Syria is accused of funneling weapons to Hezbollah from its border with Lebanon.
Charity used to collect money for Hezbollah in Nigeria.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money.
